title: uDdeRequest
text: uDdeRequest Requests a data item from a DDE server application. Parameters in: $50 Service name $51 Topic name $52 Item name out: $53 Data item $status 0 =success, -1 =failure Description When uDdeRequest is used to return data from a cell in a spreadsheet application, the contents of the cell is appended with a carriage return character. Consider this when you are querying the length of returned data. The detail trigger of a command button uses uDdeRequest to retrieve data from OpenOffice Calc and place it in a field: trigger detail $50="Calc" $51="wrksht.ods" $52="R2C2" activate "udde".uDdeRequest() if ($status=0) field.entity=$53 else message "Request did not succeed" endif end Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
